description: Initial local DMC floss catalogue. Main file currently includes DMC Mouliné Spécial solid stranded cotton entries only. Specialty and variegated ranges are listed in dmc-gaps.json until verified.
assumptions: Only DMC-branded cross-stitch-relevant stranded floss is in scope.
The dmcCode is the stitcher-facing floss colour code. rangeSku is the official DMC range SKU where available. localItemCode is derived locally and should not be treated as an official per-skein SKU.
Hex/RGB colours are seed approximations for matching and UI filtering, not exact physical thread colours.
White/blank fabric is still treated separately by the current app; white floss entries are included here for completeness but the app can decide not to recommend white for blank cells.

sourceSummary.officialRangeSource: DMC official product and range pages
sourceSummary.colourSeedSource: Cassandra Dias DMC Colors to RGB Conversion Chart; open DMC/RGB datasets were considered as seed-only references

Mouline Special.sourceStatus: included with official DMC range metadata and open colour seed hex/RGB values

Mouline Coloris.sourceStatus: deferred to dmc-gaps.json because variegated component colours need manual verification

Mouline Color Variations.sourceStatus: deferred to dmc-gaps.json because variegated component colours need manual verification; DMC page copy also mentions 36 shades in technical details, so count needs verification

Mouline Satin.sourceStatus: deferred to dmc-gaps.json because satin/rayon shades need separate verification even where codes correspond to cotton shades

Mouline Light Effects.sourceStatus: deferred to dmc-gaps.json because metallic, pearlescent, fluorescent and glow-in-the-dark shades require per-code verification

Mouline Etoile.sourceStatus: deferred to dmc-gaps.json because DMC displays 34 options but technical details say 35 sparkling colours, requiring manual verification
